caption: A man with dark hair wearing a light-colored button-down shirt is seated in front of a white backdrop featuring various logos, including "theCUBE" and "#BigDataSV 2015," along with blue geometric cube graphics. He is captured in a medium shot, speaking and gesturing slightly with his hands. On the table in front of him sits a clear plastic water bottle. A blue and gold graphic overlay appears at the bottom of the screen, containing the text "#theCUBE LIVE at #BigDataSV 2015" and "Fairmont Hurst - Valley Room San Jose, CA," alongside a logo for "NEO OBJECTS." As the sequence progresses, the man continues talking, with subtle changes in his facial expression and head position, while the background, logos, and on-screen text remain static throughout the clip.
